title: Singapore man targeted by former schoolmate who posted AI images of them as couple with baby
description: SINGAPORE: Around December 2025, administrative assistant Luke (not his real name), who is single, was told that there were photos of him with a woman claiming to be his fiancee and the baby they supposedly had together.

title: AI, health, security: test your business creativity with Edition 237 of our weekly quiz!
description: This insightful feature from YourStory tests and strengthens your business acumen! Here are 5 questions to kick off this 237th quiz. Ready?

title: How the Shanghai Film Festival Is Embracing Cinema’s Future: From AI to iPhone Moviemaking
description: As the line between film festival and tech expo continues to blur in China, SIFF ran filmmaking labs for work created by artificial intelligence, iPhone or virtual reality.

title: Tony Leung Reflects on the Rise of AI and His Hopes for the Future of Film
description: In Shanghai to head the Golden Goblet jury, the Hong Kong icon explains AI's threat to creativity, how to keep young audiences in movie theaters, and his late-career swerve into European arthouse cinema.

title: The Atlantic created a searchable database of the music used to train AI
description: Atlantic reporter Alex Reisner recently uncovered four datasets of music being used to train AI models and made them fully searchable for the public. Two of the sets are absolutely enormous at 12 million and 9 million tracks. The other two are much smaller, but still represent a significant amount of training data at over [...] The post The Atlantic created a searchable database of the music used to train AI appeared first on News Pub .
